channel.title: Aboutballoons on Angie Lee
channel.description: Recent content in Aboutballoons on Angie Lee

item.title: Where?
item.author: angiel2@illinois.edu (Angie)
item.description: I’m currently based in Champaign, IL, but I grew up in Singapore and Malaysia. I enjoy traveling, so every now and then you can find me spawning at new (and also old) places.
